title: Blake Lively Made No Money in Justin Baldoni Settlement, But Legal Fight Is Not Quite Over
content:
ByGene Maddaus

Senior Media Writer

No money changed hands in the settlement betweenBlake LivelyandJustin Baldoni, but the legal fight between the “It Ends With Us” co-stars is not quite over.

Lively still has apending motionfor attorneys’ fees and damages in connection with Baldoni’s failed defamation suit against her.

“Anyone purporting to confirm the terms of the confidential settlement at this point is misleading you,” said a source close to the matter. “More information about this confidential settlement will be on the court’s docket in the coming days.”

Lively agreed on Monday to drop her three remaining claims against Wayfarer Studios and the company’s team of publicists, avoiding a trial that was set to begin on May 18. Lively had alleged that Wayfarer — of which Baldoni is co-founder and co-chairman — illegally retaliated against her after she accused Baldoni of sexual harassment on the set of the film.

Most of Lively’s original claims — including all claims of sexual harassment — had already been dismissed last month.

By reaching a settlement, both sides avoided the multimillion-dollar cost of a federal trial. TMZ reported, along with Page Six and others, andVarietyconfirmed, that Lively received no compensation as part of the deal. Baldoni’s side was said to be “ecstatic” at the resolution of the case.

But Baldoni’s $400 million defamation suit — which wasthrown outlast June — still has to proceed to a final conclusion. Baldoni, Wayfarer, and the publicists filed the complaint in January 2025, alleging that Lively and her husband, Ryan Reynolds, and their publicists had leveraged false allegations of harassment in order to tarnish Baldoni’s reputation and hijack the film.

Judge Lewis Liman threw out the suit on the grounds that Lively’s allegations were included in legal filings and therefore immune.

In their motion to dismiss the complaint, Lively’s attorneys also sought attorneys’ fees, treble damages, and punitive damages under a 2023California lawmeant to protect sexual abuse accusers from retaliatory defamation claims.

In his ruling, Liman took no position on whether the law — known as the Protecting Survivors from Weaponized Defamation Lawsuits Act — applied. He denied Lively’s claim for fees and damages under the act, but invited her to renew the motion, which she did in September.

Baldoni’s attorneysopposedthe motion in October, arguing that it sought “draconian” relief and infringed on Baldoni’s constitutional right to petition the courts. The attorneys also argued that the California law should not apply to conduct that took place in New York and New Jersey. They later used a similar argument to successfully move to throw out Lively’s harassment claims that were filed under California law.

Equal Rights Advocates and the California Employment Lawyers Association, which sponsored the 2023 law,filedan amicus brief in May 2025 arguing that Baldoni’s defamation complaint was “the prototypical suit” which the law was meant to address.

“Ms. Lively is a public figure, and this lawsuit has captured the attention of the American public,” the groups argued. “The outcome of this motion will affect the decision-making of other victims of sexual harassment and assault.”
title_zh: 布蕾克·萊弗利(Blake Lively)在賈斯汀·巴爾多尼(Justin Baldoni)的和解中沒有獲得任何金錢，但法律鬥爭尚未結束。
content_zh:
作者：吉恩·馬達斯 (Gene Maddaus)

資深媒體撰稿人

在布蕾克·萊弗利 (Blake Lively) 和賈斯汀·巴爾多尼 (Justin Baldoni) 之間的和解中並沒有金錢的交換，但這對《我們的結局》(It Ends With Us) 的共同主演之間的法律鬥爭尚未結束。

萊弗利仍有一項關於律師費和損害賠償的待決動議，與巴爾多尼針對她的失敗誹謗訴訟有關。

“任何此刻聲稱確認保密和解條款的人都是在誤導你，”一位接近此事的消息人士表示。“有關這項保密和解的更多信息將在未來幾天內出現在法庭的公文中。”

萊弗利在週一同意撤回對Wayfarer Studios及該公司的公關團隊的三項剩餘索賠，避免了一場原定於5月18日開始的審判。萊弗利曾指控Wayfarer——巴爾多尼的共同創辦公司——在她指控巴爾多尼在片場性騷擾後非法報復她。

萊弗利的原始索賠大部分——包括所有性騷擾的索賠——已於上個月被駁回。

通過達成和解，雙方避免了聯邦審判的數百萬美元成本。TMZ、Page Six等媒體報導，並且《綜藝》(Variety) 確認，萊弗利在這筆交易中並未獲得任何賠償。巴爾多尼方面對案件的解決表示“欣喜若狂”。

但巴爾多尼的4億美元誹謗訴訟——去年6月被駁回——仍需進一步結束。巴爾多尼、Wayfarer及公關人員於2025年1月提出訴訟，指控萊弗利及她的丈夫瑞安·雷諾茲 (Ryan Reynolds) 和他們的公關人員利用虛假性騷擾指控來損害巴爾多尼的名譽並劫持電影。

法官路易斯·利曼 (Lewis Liman) 駁回了該訴訟，理由是萊弗利的指控已包含在法律文件中，因此享有豁免權。

在駁回該訴訟的動議中，萊弗利的律師還要求根據2023年加州法律索取律師費、三倍賠償和懲罰性賠償，該法律旨在保護性虐待指控者免受報復性誹謗訴訟。

在他的裁決中，利曼對該法律——即《保護倖存者免受武器化誹謗訴訟法》(Protecting Survivors from Weaponized Defamation Lawsuits Act)——是否適用未表明立場。他駁回了萊弗利根據該法案提出的費用和損害賠償要求，但邀請她重新提出動議，萊弗利在九月做到了這一點。

巴爾多尼的律師在十月反對該動議，辯稱該動議尋求“苛刻”的救濟，並侵犯了巴爾多尼的憲法請願權。律師們還辯稱，加州法律不應適用於在紐約和新澤西發生的行為。他們後來使用類似的論點成功地駁回了根據加州法律提出的萊弗利的騷擾指控。

平權倡導者(Equal Rights Advocates)和加州就業律師協會(California Employment Lawyers Association)，這兩個組織贊助了2023年的法律，於2025年5月提交了友方意見書，主張巴爾多尼(Baldoni)的誹謗訴訟是“該法律旨在解決的典型案件”。

這些團體辯稱：“莉芙莉(Ms. Lively)是一位公共人物，而這起訴訟引起了美國公眾的關注。這項動議的結果將影響其他性騷擾和攻擊受害者的決策。”
summary_zh:
作者：吉恩·馬達斯 (Gene Maddaus)

資深媒體撰稿人

在布蕾克·萊弗利 (Blake Lively) 和賈斯汀·巴爾多尼 (Justin Baldoni) 之間的和解中並沒有金錢的交換，但這對《我們的結局》(It Ends With Us) 的共同主演之間的法律鬥爭尚未結束。

萊弗利仍有一項關於律師費和損害賠償的待決動議，與巴爾多尼針對她的失敗誹謗訴訟有關。
